definition: a proposition carried by vote : especially a measure passed in the  ἐκκλησία, a decree , (Aristophanes Comicus); τὸ Μεγαρέων ψ. the decree  concerning them, (Thucydides); so, περὶ Μεγαρέων ψ. (Thucydides); ψ. γράφειν to bring in a decree , (Aristophanes Comicus); ψ. ἐπιψηφίζειν, of the πρόεδροι, to put it  to the vote, (Aeschines Orator); ψ. νικᾶν to carry it , (Aeschines Orator); ψ. καθαιρεῖν to rescind it , Lat. abrogare, (Thucydides) (ML)
